name: great-operators
description: Nine operations personas (Cook, Grove, Munger, McCord, Deming, Ohno, Horowitz, Walton, Kelleher) plus four operational skills for operating plans, process reviews, and project initialization. Drafted by great-authors writers via cross-plugin orchestration. Eighth in the Caseproof persona constellation. Warren Buffett stays in great-minds for strategic capital allocation (cross-dispatchable); operators handles execution craft.
